query: Can you create a 5-day travel itinerary for me? We are a group of 8 starting from Salt Lake City and intend to visit 2 cities in Texas from March 14th to March 18th, 2022. Our budget has been updated to $12,000. We require our accommodations to have a visitors-friendly house rule.

plan.current_city: from Salt Lake City to Abilene
plan.transportation: self-driving, from Salt Lake City to Abilene, duration: 16 hours 59 mins, distance: 1,740 km, cost: 87
plan.attraction: The Grace Museum; Frontier Texas!; Historic Fort Phantom Hill;
plan.accommodation: Gramercy Park restful, cozy, sun-filled home, Amarillo

plan.attraction: 12th Armored Division Memorial; National Center for Children's Illustrated Literature; Abilene Zoo;
plan.accommodation: Gramercy Park restful, cozy, sun-filled home, Amarillo

plan.attraction: Don Harrington Discovery Center; Texas Air & Space Museum; Amarillo Museum of Art;
plan.accommodation: Gramercy Park restful, cozy, sun-filled home, Amarillo
